codeSummary: React+Tailwind reference code for the [PC] / landing frame (1920x1080). Root bg-white. Children: bottom (CTA button '구경해보기' bg #9935FF radius 12), Frame 2625 (column gap 30, two feature cards img_01/img_02 bg #F6F8FF radius 16 h324 w1200), header (1920x64, logo 'Rolling' + outlined button '롤링 페이퍼 만들기', bottom line #EDEDED). img_01: Point.01 badge (#9935FF pill radius 50) + heading '누구나 손쉽게, 온라인 롤링 페이퍼를 만들 수 있어요' (24 Bold #181818) + sub '로그인 없이 자유롭게 만들어요.' (18 Regular #555) on left; decorative message-card instance (imgImg avatars, from 박대영/강미나, tags #ECD9FF/#E2F5FF) on right. img_02: emoji-reaction instance (rounded chips bg rgba(0,0,0,0.54) with emojis, '추가' add button) on left; Point.02 badge + heading '서로에게 이모지로 감정을 표현해보세요' + sub '롤링 페이퍼에 이모지를 추가할 수 있어요.' on right.
